Class CardDeck

java.lang.Object
Model.Board.CardDeck
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Iterable<AdventureCardFilip>
public class CardDeck extends Object implements Iterable<AdventureCardFilip>, Serializable, Cloneable
Basically a wrapper of List<AdventureCard>.

Originally intended as an abstraction to be further expanded upon, it is currently only a wrapper.

Would benefit if further specialized into HiddenCardDeck, PeekableCardDeck and UpcomingCardDeck. Why? Mostly because not every method should be usable for each type of deck (and even if so they should not all behave the same way).

See Also:

      private final List<AdventureCardFilip> cards
      List of AdventureCard
      See Also:
      • List

  • Constructor Details

    • CardDeck

      public CardDeck()
      Default CardDeck constructor.

      Sets this.cards to be an empty ArrayList of AdventureCards.

    • CardDeck

      public CardDeck(List<AdventureCardFilip> cards)
      CardDeck constructor given a List of AdventureCards.

      Sets this.cards as an ArrayList copy of the cards parameter.

      Parameters:
      cards - List of AdventureCards to be copied

    • CardDeck

      public CardDeck(AdventureCardFilip[] cards)
      CardDeck constructor given an Array of AdventureCards.

      Sets this.cards as an ArrayList copy of the cards parameter.

      Parameters:
      cards - Array of AventureCards to be copied

  • Method Details

    • shuffleDeck

      public CardDeck shuffleDeck()
      CardDeck suffler: creates new CardDeck with shuffled AdventureCards. Does not change this deck's List of AdventureCards.
      Returns:
      new CardDeck with elements of this, but shuffled

    • popCard

      public AdventureCardFilip popCard()
      Removes the first AdventureCard from the deck and it returns it
      Returns:
      card AdventureCard that was on top of the deck

    • pushCard

      public void pushCard(AdventureCardFilip card)
      Puts AdventureCard card at the top of the deck.

      Any call to popCard will return the content of the latest pushCard call.

      Parameters:
      card - Card to be placed on top of the deck

    • peekCards

      public List<AdventureCardFilip> peekCards()
      This method creates a copy of the cards present in the deck and returns them as a List.
      Returns:
      copy of this.cards list

      public Iterator<AdventureCardFilip> iterator()
